applock.title: App lock
applock.desc: Lock the application with a password

biometrics.title: Use biometrics
biometrics.desc: Unlock via your fingerprint or face

allowRemoteContent.title: Allow remote content
allowRemoteContent.desc: Allow Ampersand to use the Internet to query remote content, such as images in Markdown fields and avatars in third-party imports.

passwordAlert.text: Are you sure you want to proceed? Before proceeding, please note down your password somewhere outside Ampersand as you won't be able to recover your data or reset your password if you lose it. Be sure to export your data before setting one!
